name: Bao Shao
page_title: Bao Shao 鮑邵 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Bao Shao, born in Taishan, was the son of Bao Xin. He was enfeoffed in AD 212 in memory of his father’s loyalty and service to Cao Cao. He was later appointed Commandant of Cavalry with the Staff of Authority. (1)

1: [CITE=RAFE:TOME]

full_text:
Bao Shao 鮑邵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bao Shao (鮑邵)was born in Taishan. Enfeoffed in memory of the loyalty of his father Bao Xin. Bao Shao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Bao Shao, born in Taishan, was the son of Bao Xin. He was enfeoffed in AD 212 in memory of his father’s loyalty and service to Cao Cao. He was later appointed Commandant of Cavalry with the Staff of Authority. (1)
